basic_details.job_title: NAM Kerala Ayurveda Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Ayush Mission (NAM Kerala) Ayurveda Therapist Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. Have been announced through the NAM Kerala Ayurveda Therapist Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 40 years of age who have completed an Ayurveda Therapist Course conducted by Govt. of Kerala (DAME Approved) or One Year Ayurveda Therapist Course conducted by NARIP Cheruthuruthi are eligible to apply for these Ayurveda Therapist vacancies. The offline application process for NAM Kerala Ayurveda Therapist Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 22-05-2026. Candidates

age_limit.age_details: Max: 40 years (Retired Ayurveda Therapists below 60 years allowed)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: Retired Ayurveda Therapists below the age of 60 years are allowed.

qualification.education_qualification: Ayurveda Therapist Course conducted by Govt. of Kerala (DAME Approved) or One Year Ayurveda Therapist Course conducted by NARIP Cheruthuruthi.
qualification.details: Ayurveda Therapist (Male & Female): Ayurveda Therapist Course conducted by Govt. of Kerala (DAME Approved) or One Year Ayurveda Therapist Course conducted by NARIP Cheruthuruthi.

selection_process: Interview Written test (if 20 or more applicants for a post)
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Ayurveda Therapist post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Ayurveda Therapist position is 22nd May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Ayurveda Therapist role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed an Ayurveda Therapist Course approved by the Government of Kerala (DAME Approved) or a One Year Ayurveda Therapist Course from NARIP Cheruthuruthi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 40 years. However, retired Ayurveda Therapists below the age of 60 years are also eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Ayurveda Therapist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 14,700/- per month for the Ayurveda Therapist post.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. You must send the completed application form along with required documents to the specified address via post or by direct submission.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the National Ayush Mission Kerala Ayurveda Therapist recruitment is offline. Candidates are required to send their applications by post or submit them directly.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Ayurveda Therapist post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview. A written test may also be conducted if there are 20 or more applicants for the post.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Ayurveda Therapist position is offered on a contract basis under the National Ayush Mission.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location?
faq.answer: The job is located in Pathanamthitta, Kerala, with the application address being The District Programme Manager, District Programme Management and Supporting Unit, National AYUSH Mission, Orikompil Building 2nd Floor, Melevettipuram, Pathanamthitta - 689645.
